title: Humans and tigers: life among the mangroves

title: The genocide that still haunts Namibia
content: Between 1904 and 1908 colonial troops in German South West Africa killed tens of thousands of Herero and Nama. Their descendants feel powerless in the face of impending economic upheavals.
snippet: Between 1904 and 1908 colonial troops in German South West Africa killed tens of thousands of Herero and Nama. Their descendants feel powerless in the face of impending economic upheavals.
creator: Clotilde Ravel

title: Indonesia: depoliticised injustice
content: Indonesia's leftwing activists used to believe Reformasi would produce economic policy that was pro organised labour. They're still waiting.
snippet: Indonesia's leftwing activists used to believe Reformasi would produce economic policy that was pro organised labour. They're still waiting.
creator: Vedi R Hadiz

title: Where the Ganges and Brahmaputra meet
content: The Sundarbans Biosphere Reserve is the world's largest mangrove forest. But as rising seas erode the delta, the balance between conservation and human survival is fragile.
snippet: The Sundarbans Biosphere Reserve is the world's largest mangrove forest. But as rising seas erode the delta, the balance between conservation and human survival is fragile.
creator: Bertrand Daugeron

title: Military dominance, strategic defeat
content: Militarily, the US might be ‘utterly dominant', but that does not guarantee achieving its strategic goals. Iran is only the latest reminder of that.
snippet: Militarily, the US might be ‘utterly dominant', but that does not guarantee achieving its strategic goals. Iran is only the latest reminder of that.
creator: Alexander Zevin

title: The US Democrats' foreign policy dead end
content: Democratic criticism of Trump's wars in Iran and Israel's assault on Gaza has been cautious, almost procedural. The party remains attached to a foreign policy doctrine that many supporters have abandoned.
snippet: Democratic criticism of Trump's wars in Iran and Israel's assault on Gaza has been cautious, almost procedural. The party remains attached to a foreign policy doctrine that many supporters have
creator: Martin Barnay

title: Iraq stakes a claim to Gulf waters
content: Iraq inherited an awkward geography on independence in 1932 and has spent a century trying to escape it. Now, competing claims to maritime zones and hydrocarbon reserves are reigniting old disputes.
snippet: Iraq inherited an awkward geography on independence in 1932 and has spent a century trying to escape it. Now, competing claims to maritime zones and hydrocarbon reserves are reigniting old disputes.
creator: Didier Ortolland

title: The nationalist ideology that binds India to Israel
content: Once staunchly pro-Palestinian, India under Narendra Modi has forged close ties with Israel that are about more than arms sales: there's a deep ideological affinity between Hindu nationalism and Zionism.
snippet: Once staunchly pro-Palestinian, India under Narendra Modi has forged close ties with Israel that are about more than arms sales: there's a deep ideological affinity between Hindu nationalism and
creator: Camille Auvray

title: The Balkans in Europe's waiting room
content: The EU promises the Balkans a bright future within the bloc. Yet enlargement remains stalled while member states profit from the Balkans' skilled labour, mineral resources – and migration control.
snippet: The EU promises the Balkans a bright future within the bloc. Yet enlargement remains stalled while member states profit from the Balkans' skilled labour, mineral resources – and migration control.
creator: Jean-Arnault Dérens

title: Unlocking peace in Ukraine
content: After four years of war, Moscow has already scaled back some of its key demands. Europe must now offer both sides a path to a lasting peace.
snippet: After four years of war, Moscow has already scaled back some of its key demands. Europe must now offer both sides a path to a lasting peace.
creator: Anatol Lieven

title: US changes its tune on the Balkans
content: With the war in Ukraine reshaping regional politics, Washington is applying its transactional approach to the Balkans through energy projects and political alliances, exposing the limits of EU influence.
snippet: With the war in Ukraine reshaping regional politics, Washington is applying its transactional approach to the Balkans through energy projects and political alliances, exposing the limits of EU
creator: Ana Otašević

title: The AI backlash has begun
content: The US public are resisting the construction of the vast data centres AI needs to achieve exponential growth. This is only the most visible sign of mounting opposition to the technology.
snippet: The US public are resisting the construction of the vast data centres AI needs to achieve exponential growth. This is only the most visible sign of mounting opposition to the technology.
creator: Pierre Rimbert

title: When France dared to dream
content: In 1945 the Resistance invited ordinary French people to imagine their country's future. A long-forgotten archive reveals their hopes and fears.
snippet: In 1945 the Resistance invited ordinary French people to imagine their country's future. A long-forgotten archive reveals their hopes and fears.
creator: Benoît Bréville
